TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ciw-ben nu Taywan sin-pey-se Luy-bang a kakitizaan, pawang tu Kilung a buyu', hamin nu niyazu' masakayayak ku lala', sakasa micidek ku kasakayayak atu masatukal ku nipatineng tu luma'. sumamad madengdeng ku misikitangay, mikutkut tu sikitang malawpes tu. 1990 a mihcaan naitini misasing tu hekal a saingaan tu "kalaluman a tukuy" atu 2001 a mihcaan patahkal tu misaungyay a nizungaan a kucudud "malebut atu mikilin malrbut" misengi tu itiniay a hekal, satu Ciw-ben micidek ku malumayay a nipatineng, masakayakay ku lala' u hekal malilid ku kanatalay atu hekalay a tademaw a miazih, tiniay a kitizaan muliyaw a izaw ku sakauzip, mala u piidangan tu ayza. Ciw-ben, pangangan han nu itiniay "Ciw-ben-cay" han "Taywan a kamu, K√°u-hŇęn-√°", kakayzaan a ngangan nu kitizaan atu yadahay ku masasengiay tu malumanay ngangan nu kitzaan nu Taywan, makayniay i mipatadas nu Laayak a kusian a pasazuma, pangangan mananam micunus tu sulit "ku", "ben", "ciw", cye" aningangan. Amalucek ku kamu, kasumamadan Ciw-ben muenengay a tademaw hatu mialaay tu zakes mitangtang tu zakes a simal ku kawaw, iza ku 90 ku satangtang tu "cang-naw" a palud, 10 ku cacay atatudung a palul, pulung iza ku Ciw-ben. Taywan kaLipunan a pikuwan, Ciw-ben a niyazu' pakenisen tungus nu "Kan-cay-lyaw-cwang" a sakuwan, nuwalian nu zumaay a niyazu' Cin-kwi-s pakenisen tungus nu "Ciw-ben a niyazu'" a sakuwan, tusaay tungusay nu Kilung a luma', 1920 a mihcaan "Ta-cen siw a mihcaan "Taywan a sin-cen-ci hamin pasumaden ku kakenis, Lipun a cen-bu apasasumaden ku Ken-cey-lyaw-cwang, Ciw-ben a niyazu' pasumaden tu "Ken-ce-lwaw", Ciw-ben tusa ku tabakiay a silit. 1933 a mihcaan "caw-he walu a mihcaan"Taywan a cungtu musakamu "Ciw-ben" tabakiay a silit sumad han tu "Cin-kwa-s" tabakiay a sulit. Kilung a sauwac sikim I kahulaman iza t uku kamu,tini i1889 a mihcaan zayhan patizeng tu Kilung Taypak nu silamalay a zazan maazih ku sikimay a buyu', misanga'ay tu zazan a kuli i capi nu Pa-tu balabalasan a sauwacan maazih ku sielac a kim, maymaw sa malikid tapabaw katukuh tabakiay a kasahebung. Ciw-ben i 1892 a mihcaan maazih ku kim sikitang, 1893 a mihcaan Cin-kwa-s a byu' nu sikitangay maazih ku kim sikitang, namakayza malingatu katuud ku tademaw mikim itiza atu likisi nu mikimay. 2001 a mihcaan, Ciw-ben sapatiyam a patiyamay tatenga' patizeng tu sapatiyam kasakakaput a katatengil. 2008 a mihcaan 11 a bulad, pakalisiway tu tatudungay tu adidi'ay a kusian mikawaw tu "misabaluhay tu keci paazih mikitadu tu sakaput a saupu pasasumad tu siyang a milekakawa", i Ciw-ben a kitizaan pacumud tu sakaput a saupu a wangcan, caay paacaen ku pisawanglu tu Wi-Fi "likut nu Ci-san a zazan atu suci a zazan u kakatayzaan a kitizaan. pakala tu 90% pesen a kitizaan maala ku Wi-Fi" a sapakatineng, dinkiay a patiyamay a sapacakay, amahiniay piazihan a luing"tanenng miazih tu hekal, tu sabeleng tu tademaw atu demiad", QR Code a kacacayat "imahini u sapisiwkay tu patiyamaw a tuud" hatini ku malecaday analimaan, sainakaay a Ciw-ben macunus ku nu ayzaay a ziday micukaymas tu su-wi. Ciw-ben mabulah tu malumanay hekal nu aazihan katuud ku masulupay nu miidangnay a labang tayni mipalabang, uyza u sumamaday a maci yadah ku zazan nu maci anipapulung, makay Taywan a nipanganga. macinglaway a tizaan a ngangan malecapu i Ci-san a maci, Su-ci a zazan atu cin-pyen a zazan hatini a macian a zazan. Ci-san "Taywan akamu, Ki-san-ke", iza ku Ciw-ben maci" nipangangan, Ciw-ben nu sicinglaway a maci, nakalacapuan a labii nu tiniay a binawlan kuyni a kitizaan, kyu iayaw pangangan han tu an-cya-cay "Taywa a kamu, √Äm-ke-√°", anumahicahica tu demiad ancaay nu u pilipayan katuud macacelcel ku tademaw, atu Ciw-ben mikawaway, kakaen tu nu taliay a tunuz, Ciw-ben sa u saayawaya a mikawaw, iza ku lasubuay tu a likisi nu nipatizeng tu Ciw-ben ucya a pikawawan, atu Ciw-ben nu pigingkiwan tu likisi itini patizang, iza henay ku piazihan picekulan tu bayu. Ci-san labu nu maci ciw-cung a cin-ke-can nu malumanay nu sakapahay a nipatizangay, kalawlaway a dingki u kabulahan tu malumanay ku mahiniay. su-ci a zazan "Taywan a kamu, KhińĀ-kińĀ-lŇćo", Taywan imi a kamu maapilis ku zazan, u micidekay "cye' sulit a zazan, Ciw-beng nu pabesutay a zazan 300 tu ku masatukulay a zazan, yadah ku aazihan nu paucyan malecapu tuyni a zazan nu maci. ŤĪéŚīéŤ∑Į(ŤáļŤ™ě:KhińĀ-kińĀ-lŇćo): . Cin-pyen zazan "Layak a kamu, Khing-pińĀn-lŇćo", Layak a kamu "Cin-pyen" tuzu' tu u simukingay bihel a kazizeng, uyni a zaza pakayzaay U-ban a pikutkutan tu Kwang, zikuz a kazizeng 1954 a mihcaan tastasan tu, mala u kahenulan maci a zazan nu Cin-pyen. Can-cu-syang "Layal a kamu, Ts«Ļg-Tsh√Ļ-hńĀng", Layak a imi sa uyza u can milakuitay tu luma' a cucudedan, misulit tu micaliwa tu cucudedan a luma. tuzu' u niatatules angangan a zazan adidi'ay a cucudedan, saca haw maselep ku tatukian tu pananukas tu cye-ced, amiliyas tu kacelcel nu tademaw. uyni a zazan u micangzayey tu byu' ahebalay saculin a zaza, la'cus micumud ku kazizeng. Ciw-ben sa u sakatayza i Luy-bang kalinlakuay a zazan syen-tau 102 banggu mapanganga aca tu kazizeng zazan, kaLipunan a ziday u "culil sanay kazizeng a zazan", mahiniay tu ku nizateng nu balucu' pawapen tu kazizeng muculil, acaluway ku miculu'ay tu tuud. uyni Ciw-ben pikacawan tu basu a payay tini a patizang, tini mala piculilan a zazan nu katuuday nu midangay a labang. uyza i Ciw-beng a kitizaan tunu udad, tunu bali sa sakasa tiniay badahung a nisanga'an matinih ku nisekian, badahungay a sapad pasaksaken tu cacay sisicen tu lumeni'ay a tamaka "lumeni'ay a tatipeluk", u sapilawa' tu bali udad, saca mayasuy ku sapisanga' a kulisiw, nika kalaludan mihedup tu akuti' ku la'cus. uyzasa kilul masatukuy tu ayza, sisa tiniay mueneng a tademaw haymaw sa pakutayen tu nu amutuay a badahung, lumeni'ay banges a badahung ahekal haymaw satu malawpes. Ciw-benay malumanay tu malumanay nipabeliay nu tahak yadah ku asu'ay a kakanen, patinaku mulu a tali atu mulu a tubah, caay ku izaway tu a tubah atu tali a asu dada', iza henay ku mulu wadayan atu micidekay a muw-ca, cima atu kulecu a asu', cu'det akuti' hamin kapah, bangsis kudet asu'ay a kukuy nu tali, tatungus ku sicedam ahecid nu cawakuy, labu matumes ku saytaw anipatabu "nicikcikan a saytaw" maacakay a kabus a cawakuy, sumanahay muluay tamud nu nisanga'an tu nipatawa, patatungus tu sikedetay hekal a banges atu micidek ku sapitenas a tawyu, caay kuyni dada' iza hwna ku lumeni'ay a tunus, tawciw, pitan asu'ay a kakaen. Ciw-ben "paazih tu nakamuan milawlaway a Di'tu" tawya a demiad maling tahkal paazih tu katalawa, makay ayza a demiad malingatu mikawaw katukuh 12/31 a demiad, situngusa tuyni a kawaw ayaw a pakatineng , pateng mipazeng i panan nu Sen-pin a piazihan tu kacudu 6 ku kudih nu mapatayay a mipanang, iza henay ku mu-na-s, labuay bayu nu micidekay a buting a paazih tu bangcalay. šĻĚšĽĹ" . malaitin tu i hekalay tu zumaay anatinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ¶iw-b…ôn nu tajwan sin-p…ô-s…ô r~…ĺuj-baŇč a kakitizaan, pawaŇč tu kir~…ĺuŇč a buju Ē~ °, ńßamin nu nijazu Ē~ ° masakajajak ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, sakasa mi ¶id…ôk ku kasakajajak atu masatukar~…ĺ ku nipatin…ôŇč tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. sumamad mad…ôŇčd…ôŇč ku misikitaŇčaj, mikutkut tu sikitaŇč mar~…ĺawp…ôs tu. **** a mińß ¶aan naitini misasiŇč tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a saiŇčaan tu "kar~…ĺar~…ĺuman a tukuj" atu **** a mińß ¶aan patańßkar~…ĺ tu misauŇčjaj a nizuŇčaan a ku ¶udud "mar~…ĺ…ôbut atu mikir~…ĺin mar~…ĺrbut" mis…ôŇči tu itiniaj a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, satu ¶iw-b…ôn mi ¶id…ôk ku mar~…ĺumajaj a nipatin…ôŇč, masakajakaj ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° u ńß…ôkar~…ĺ mar~…ĺir~…ĺid ku kanatar~…ĺaj atu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw a miazińß, tiniaj a kitizaan mur~…ĺijaw a izaw ku sakauzip, mar~…ĺa u piidaŇčan tu ajza. ¶iw-b…ôn, paŇčaŇčan ńßan nu itiniaj " ¶iw-b…ôn- ¶aj" ńßan "tajwan a kamu, k*u-ńß*n-*", kakajzaan a ŇčaŇčan nu kitizaan atu jadańßaj ku masas…ôŇčiaj tu mar~…ĺumanaj ŇčaŇčan nu kitzaan nu tajwan, makajniaj i mipatadas nu r~…ĺaajak a kusian a pasazuma, paŇčaŇčan mananam mi ¶unus tu sur~…ĺit "ku", "b…ôn", " ¶iw", ¶j…ô" aniŇčaŇčan. amar~…ĺu ¶…ôk ku kamu, kasumamadan ¶iw-b…ôn ¶iw-b…ôn nu si ¶iŇčr~…ĺawaj a ma ¶i, nakar~…ĺa ¶apuan a r~…ĺabii nu tiniaj a binawr~…ĺan kujni a kitizaan, kju iajaw paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu an- ¶ja- ¶aj "tajwa a kamu, *m-k…ô-*", anumańßi ¶ańßi ¶a tu r~…ĺikisi nu nipatiz…ôŇč tu ¶iw-b…ôn u ¶ja a pikawawan, atu ¶iw-b…ôn nu pigiŇčkiwan tu r~…ĺikisi itini patizaŇč, iza ńß…ônaj ku piazińßan pi ¶…ôkur~…ĺan tu baju. ¶i-san r~…ĺabu nu ma ¶i ¶iw- ¶uŇč a ¶in-k…ô- ¶an nu mar~…ĺumanaj nu sakapańßaj a nipatizaŇčaj, kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawaj a diŇčki u kabur~…ĺańßan tu mar~…ĺumanaj ku mańßiniaj. su- ¶i a zazan "tajwan a kamu, kńßi*-ki*-r~…ĺ*o", tajwan imi a kamu maapir~…ĺis ku zazan, u mi ¶id…ôkaj " ¶j…ô Ē~ ° sur~…ĺit a zazan, ¶iw-b…ôŇč nu pab…ôsutaj a zazan *** tu ku masatukur~…ĺaj a zazan, jadańß ku aazińßan nu pau ¶jan mar~…ĺ…ô ¶apu tujni a zazan nu ma ¶i. ***(**:kńßi*-ki*-r~…ĺ*o): . ¶in-pj…ôn zazan "r~…ĺajak a kamu, kńßiŇč-pi*n-r~…ĺ*o", r~…ĺajak a kamu " ¶in-pj…ôn" tuzu Ē~ ° tu u simukiŇčaj bińß…ôr~…ĺ a kaziz…ôŇč, ujni a zaza pakajzaaj u-ban a pikutkutan tu kwaŇč, zikuz a kaziz…ôŇč **** a mińß ¶aan tastasan tu, mar~…ĺa u kańß…ônur~…ĺan ma ¶i a zazan nu ¶in-pj…ôn. ¶an- ¶u-sjaŇč "r~…ĺajar~…ĺ a kamu, ts*g-tsńß*-ńß*Ňč", r~…ĺajak a imi sa ujza u ¶an mir~…ĺakuitaj tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° a ¶u ¶ud…ôdan, misur~…ĺit tu mi ¶ar~…ĺiwa tu ¶u ¶ud…ôdan a r~…ĺuma. tuzu Ē~ ° u niatatur~…ĺ…ôs aŇčaŇčan a zazan adidi Ē~ °aj a ¶u ¶ud…ôdan, sa ¶a ńßaw mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp ku tatukian tu pananukas tu ¶j…ô- ¶…ôd, amir~…ĺijas tu ka ¶…ôr~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺ nu tad…ômaw. ujni a zazan u mi ¶aŇčzaj…ô tu bju Ē~ ° ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj sa ¶ur~…ĺin a zaza, r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us mi ¶umud ku kaziz…ôŇč. ¶iw-b…ôn sa u sakatajza i r~…ĺuj-baŇč kar~…ĺinr~…ĺakuaj a zazan sj…ôn-tau *** baŇčgu mapaŇčaŇča a ¶a tu kaziz…ôŇč zazan, kar~…ĺipunan a zidaj u " ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ sanaj kaziz…ôŇč a zazan", mańßiniaj tu ku nizat…ôŇč nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° pawap…ôn tu kaziz…ôŇč mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, a ¶ar~…ĺuwaj ku mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °aj tu tuud. ujni ¶iw-b…ôn pika ¶awan tu basu a pajaj tini a patizaŇč, tini mar~…ĺa pi ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan a zazan nu katuudaj nu midaŇčaj a r~…ĺabaŇč. ujza i ¶iw-b…ôŇč a kitizaan tunu udad, tunu bar~…ĺi sa sakasa tiniaj badańßuŇč a nisaŇča Ē~ °an matinińß ku nis…ôkian, badańßuŇčaj a sapad pasaksak…ôn tu ¶a ¶aj sisi ¶…ôn tu r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj a tamaka "r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj a tatip…ôr~…ĺuk", u sapir~…ĺawa Ē~ ° tu bar~…ĺi udad, sa ¶a majasuj ku sapisaŇča Ē~ ° a kur~…ĺisiw, nika kar~…ĺar~…ĺudan mińß…ôdup tu akuti Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us. ujzasa kir~…ĺur~…ĺ masatukuj tu ajza, sisa tiniaj mu…ôn…ôŇč a tad…ômaw ńßajmaw sa pakutaj…ôn tu nu amutuaj a badańßuŇč, r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj baŇč…ôs a badańßuŇč ańß…ôkar~…ĺ ńßajmaw satu mar~…ĺawp…ôs. ¶iw-b…ônaj mar~…ĺumanaj tu mar~…ĺumanaj nipab…ôr~…ĺiaj nu tańßak jadańß ku asu Ē~ °aj a kakan…ôn, patinaku mur~…ĺu a tar~…ĺi atu mur~…ĺu a tubańß, ¶aaj ku izawaj tu a tubańß atu tar~…ĺi a asu dada Ē~ °, iza ńß…ônaj ku mur~…ĺu wadajan atu mi ¶id…ôkaj a muw- ¶a, ¶ima atu kur~…ĺ…ô ¶u a asu Ē~ °, ¶u Ē~ °d…ôt akuti Ē~ ° ńßamin kapańß, baŇčsis kud…ôt asu Ē~ °aj a kukuj nu tar~…ĺi, tatuŇčus ku si ¶…ôdam ańß…ô ¶id nu ¶awakuj, r~…ĺabu matum…ôs ku sajtaw anipatabu "ni ¶ik ¶ikan a sajtaw" maa ¶akaj a kabus a ¶awakuj, sumanańßaj mur~…ĺuaj tamud nu nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu nipatawa, patatuŇčus tu sik…ôd…ôtaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a baŇč…ôs atu mi ¶id…ôk ku sapit…ônas a tawju, ¶aaj kujni dada Ē~ ° iza ńßwna ku r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj a tunus, taw ¶iw, pitan asu Ē~ °aj a kaka…ôn. ¶iw-b…ôn "paazińß tu nakamuan mir~…ĺawr~…ĺawaj a di Ē~ °tu" tawja a d…ômiad mar~…ĺiŇč tańßkar~…ĺ paazińß tu katar~…ĺawa, makaj ajza a d…ômiad mar~…ĺiŇčatu mikawaw katukuńß **/** a d…ômiad, situŇčusa tujni a kawaw ajaw a pakatin…ôŇč , pat…ôŇč mipaz…ôŇč i panan nu s…ôn-pin a piazińßan tu ka ¶udu * ku kudińß nu mapatajaj a mipanaŇč, iza ńß…ônaj ku mu-na-s, r~…ĺabuaj baju nu mi ¶id…ôkaj a butiŇč a paazińß tu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj. **" . mar~…ĺaitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj tu zumaaj anatin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ciw-ben nu Taywan sin-pey-se Luy-bang a kakitizaan, pawang tu Kilung a buyu', hamin nu niyazu' masakayayak ku lala', sakasa micidek ku kasakayayak atu masatukal ku nipatineng tu luma'. sumamad madengdeng ku misikitangay, mikutkut tu sikitang malawpes tu. 1990 a mihcaan naitini misasing tu hekal a saingaan tu "kalaluman a tukuy" atu 2001 a mihcaan patahkal tu misaungyay a nizungaan a kucudud "malebut atu mikilin malrbut" misengi tu itiniay a hekal, satu Ciw-ben micidek ku malumayay a nipatineng, masakayakay ku lala' u hekal malilid ku kanatalay atu hekalay a tademaw a miazih, tiniay a kitizaan muliyaw a izaw ku sakauzip, mala u piidangan tu ayza. Ciw-ben, pangangan han nu itiniay "Ciw-ben-cay" han "Taywan a kamu, K√°u-hŇęn-√°", kakayzaan a ngangan nu kitizaan atu yadahay ku masasengiay tu malumanay ngangan nu kitzaan nu Taywan, makayniay i mipatadas nu Laayak a kusian a pasazuma, pangangan mananam micunus tu sulit "ku", "ben", "ciw", cye" aningangan. Amalucek ku kamu, kasumamadan Ciw-ben muenengay a tademaw hatu mialaay tu zakes mitangtang tu zakes a simal ku kawaw, iza ku 90 ku satangtang tu "cang-naw" a palud, 10 ku cacay atatudung a palul, pulung iza ku Ciw-ben. Taywan kaLipunan a pikuwan, Ciw-ben a niyazu' pakenisen tungus nu "Kan-cay-lyaw-cwang" a sakuwan, nuwalian nu zumaay a niyazu' Cin-kwi-s pakenisen tungus nu "Ciw-ben a niyazu'" a sakuwan, tusaay tungusay nu Kilung a luma', 1920 a mihcaan "Ta-cen siw a mihcaan "Taywan a sin-cen-ci hamin pasumaden ku kakenis, Lipun a cen-bu apasasumaden ku Ken-cey-lyaw-cwang, Ciw-ben a niyazu' pasumaden tu "Ken-ce-lwaw", Ciw-ben tusa ku tabakiay a silit. 1933 a mihcaan "caw-he walu a mihcaan"Taywan a cungtu musakamu "Ciw-ben" tabakiay a silit sumad han tu "Cin-kwa-s" tabakiay a sulit. Kilung a sauwac sikim I kahulaman iza t uku kamu,tini i1889 a mihcaan zayhan patizeng tu Kilung Taypak nu silamalay a zazan maazih ku sikimay a buyu', misanga'ay tu zazan a kuli i capi nu Pa-tu balabalasan a sauwacan maazih ku sielac a kim, maymaw sa malikid tapabaw katukuh tabakiay a kasahebung. Ciw-ben i 1892 a mihcaan maazih ku kim sikitang, 1893 a mihcaan Cin-kwa-s a byu' nu sikitangay maazih ku kim sikitang, namakayza malingatu katuud ku tademaw mikim itiza atu likisi nu mikimay. 2001 a mihcaan, Ciw-ben sapatiyam a patiyamay tatenga' patizeng tu sapatiyam kasakakaput a katatengil. 2008 a mihcaan 11 a bulad, pakalisiway tu tatudungay tu adidi'ay a kusian mikawaw tu "misabaluhay tu keci paazih mikitadu tu sakaput a saupu pasasumad tu siyang a milekakawa", i Ciw-ben a kitizaan pacumud tu sakaput a saupu a wangcan, caay paacaen ku pisawanglu tu Wi-Fi "likut nu Ci-san a zazan atu suci a zazan u kakatayzaan a kitizaan. pakala tu 90% pesen a kitizaan maala ku Wi-Fi" a sapakatineng, dinkiay a patiyamay a sapacakay, amahiniay piazihan a luing"tanenng miazih tu hekal, tu sabeleng tu tademaw atu demiad", QR Code a kacacayat "imahini u sapisiwkay tu patiyamaw a tuud" hatini ku malecaday analimaan, sainakaay a Ciw-ben macunus ku nu ayzaay a ziday micukaymas tu su-wi. Ciw-ben mabulah tu malumanay hekal nu aazihan katuud ku masulupay nu miidangnay a labang tayni mipalabang, uyza u sumamaday a maci yadah ku zazan nu maci anipapulung, makay Taywan a nipanganga. macinglaway a tizaan a ngangan malecapu i Ci-san a maci, Su-ci a zazan atu cin-pyen a zazan hatini a macian a zazan. Ci-san "Taywan akamu, Ki-san-ke", iza ku Ciw-ben maci" nipangangan, Ciw-ben nu sicinglaway a maci, nakalacapuan a labii nu tiniay a binawlan kuyni a kitizaan, kyu iayaw pangangan han tu an-cya-cay "Taywa a kamu, √Äm-ke-√°", anumahicahica tu demiad ancaay nu u pilipayan katuud macacelcel ku tademaw, atu Ciw-ben mikawaway, kakaen tu nu taliay a tunuz, Ciw-ben sa u saayawaya a mikawaw, iza ku lasubuay tu a likisi nu nipatizeng tu Ciw-ben ucya a pikawawan, atu Ciw-ben nu pigingkiwan tu likisi itini patizang, iza henay ku piazihan picekulan tu bayu. Ci-san labu nu maci ciw-cung a cin-ke-can nu malumanay nu sakapahay a nipatizangay, kalawlaway a dingki u kabulahan tu malumanay ku mahiniay. su-ci a zazan "Taywan a kamu, KhińĀ-kińĀ-lŇćo", Taywan imi a kamu maapilis ku zazan, u micidekay "cye' sulit a zazan, Ciw-beng nu pabesutay a zazan 300 tu ku masatukulay a zazan, yadah ku aazihan nu paucyan malecapu tuyni a zazan nu maci. ŤĪéŚīéŤ∑Į(ŤáļŤ™ě:KhińĀ-kińĀ-lŇćo): . Cin-pyen zazan "Layak a kamu, Khing-pińĀn-lŇćo", Layak a kamu "Cin-pyen" tuzu' tu u simukingay bihel a kazizeng, uyni a zaza pakayzaay U-ban a pikutkutan tu Kwang, zikuz a kazizeng 1954 a mihcaan tastasan tu, mala u kahenulan maci a zazan nu Cin-pyen. Can-cu-syang "Layal a kamu, Ts«Ļg-Tsh√Ļ-hńĀng", Layak a imi sa uyza u can milakuitay tu luma' a cucudedan, misulit tu micaliwa tu cucudedan a luma. tuzu' u niatatules angangan a zazan adidi'ay a cucudedan, saca haw maselep ku tatukian tu pananukas tu cye-ced, amiliyas tu kacelcel nu tademaw. uyni a zazan u micangzayey tu byu' ahebalay saculin a zaza, la'cus micumud ku kazizeng. Ciw-ben sa u sakatayza i Luy-bang kalinlakuay a zazan syen-tau 102 banggu mapanganga aca tu kazizeng zazan, kaLipunan a ziday u "culil sanay kazizeng a zazan", mahiniay tu ku nizateng nu balucu' pawapen tu kazizeng muculil, acaluway ku miculu'ay tu tuud. uyni Ciw-ben pikacawan tu basu a payay tini a patizang, tini mala piculilan a zazan nu katuuday nu midangay a labang. uyza i Ciw-beng a kitizaan tunu udad, tunu bali sa sakasa tiniay badahung a nisanga'an matinih ku nisekian, badahungay a sapad pasaksaken tu cacay sisicen tu lumeni'ay a tamaka "lumeni'ay a tatipeluk", u sapilawa' tu bali udad, saca mayasuy ku sapisanga' a kulisiw, nika kalaludan mihedup tu akuti' ku la'cus. uyzasa kilul masatukuy tu ayza, sisa tiniay mueneng a tademaw haymaw sa pakutayen tu nu amutuay a badahung, lumeni'ay banges a badahung ahekal haymaw satu malawpes. Ciw-benay malumanay tu malumanay nipabeliay nu tahak yadah ku asu'ay a kakanen, patinaku mulu a tali atu mulu a tubah, caay ku izaway tu a tubah atu tali a asu dada', iza henay ku mulu wadayan atu micidekay a muw-ca, cima atu kulecu a asu', cu'det akuti' hamin kapah, bangsis kudet asu'ay a kukuy nu tali, tatungus ku sicedam ahecid nu cawakuy, labu matumes ku saytaw anipatabu "nicikcikan a saytaw" maacakay a kabus a cawakuy, sumanahay muluay tamud nu nisanga'an tu nipatawa, patatungus tu sikedetay hekal a banges atu micidek ku sapitenas a tawyu, caay kuyni dada' iza hwna ku lumeni'ay a tunus, tawciw, pitan asu'ay a kakaen. Ciw-ben "paazih tu nakamuan milawlaway a Di'tu" tawya a demiad maling tahkal paazih tu katalawa, makay ayza a demiad malingatu mikawaw katukuh 12/31 a demiad, situngusa tuyni a kawaw ayaw a pakatineng , pateng mipazeng i panan nu Sen-pin a piazihan tu kacudu 6 ku kudih nu mapatayay a mipanang, iza henay ku mu-na-s, labuay bayu nu micidekay a buting a paazih tu bangcalay. šĻĚšĽĹ" . malaitin tu i hekalay tu zumaay anatinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ¶iw-b…ôn nu tajwan sin-p…ô-s…ô r~…ĺuj-baŇč a kakitizaan, pawaŇč tu kir~…ĺuŇč a buju Ē~ °, ńßamin nu nijazu Ē~ ° masakajajak ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, sakasa mi ¶id…ôk ku kasakajajak atu masatukar~…ĺ ku nipatin…ôŇč tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. sumamad mad…ôŇčd…ôŇč ku misikitaŇčaj, mikutkut tu sikitaŇč mar~…ĺawp…ôs tu. **** a mińß ¶aan naitini misasiŇč tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a saiŇčaan tu "kar~…ĺar~…ĺuman a tukuj" atu **** a mińß ¶aan patańßkar~…ĺ tu misauŇčjaj a nizuŇčaan a ku ¶udud "mar~…ĺ…ôbut atu mikir~…ĺin mar~…ĺrbut" mis…ôŇči tu itiniaj a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, satu ¶iw-b…ôn mi ¶id…ôk ku mar~…ĺumajaj a nipatin…ôŇč, masakajakaj ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° u ńß…ôkar~…ĺ mar~…ĺir~…ĺid ku kanatar~…ĺaj atu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw a miazińß, tiniaj a kitizaan mur~…ĺijaw a izaw ku sakauzip, mar~…ĺa u piidaŇčan tu ajza. ¶iw-b…ôn, paŇčaŇčan ńßan nu itiniaj " ¶iw-b…ôn- ¶aj" ńßan "tajwan a kamu, k*u-ńß*n-*", kakajzaan a ŇčaŇčan nu kitizaan atu jadańßaj ku masas…ôŇčiaj tu mar~…ĺumanaj ŇčaŇčan nu kitzaan nu tajwan, makajniaj i mipatadas nu r~…ĺaajak a kusian a pasazuma, paŇčaŇčan mananam mi ¶unus tu sur~…ĺit "ku", "b…ôn", " ¶iw", ¶j…ô" aniŇčaŇčan. amar~…ĺu ¶…ôk ku kamu, kasumamadan ¶iw-b…ôn apasasumad…ôn ku k…ôn- ¶…ô-r~…ĺjaw- ¶waŇč, ¶iw-b…ôn a nijazu Ē~ ° pasumad…ôn tu "k…ôn- ¶…ô-r~…ĺwaw", ¶iw-b…ôn tusa ku tabakiaj a sir~…ĺit. **** a mińß ¶aan " ¶aw-ńß…ô war~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan"tajwan a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu aazińßan katuud ku masur~…ĺupaj nu miidaŇčnaj a r~…ĺabaŇč tajni mipar~…ĺabaŇč, ujza u sumamadaj a ma ¶i jadańß ku zazan nu ma ¶i anipapur~…ĺuŇč, makaj tajwan a nipaŇčaŇča. ma ¶iw-b…ôn nu si ¶iŇčr~…ĺawaj a ma ¶i, nakar~…ĺa ¶apuan a r~…ĺabii nu tiniaj a binawr~…ĺan kujni a kitizaan, kju iajaw paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu an- ¶ja- ¶aj "tajwa a kamu, *m-k…ô-*", anumańßi ¶ańßi ¶a tu maapir~…ĺis ku zazan, u mi ¶id…ôkaj " ¶j…ô Ē~ ° sur~…ĺit a zazan, ¶iw-b…ôŇč nu pab…ôsutaj a zazan *** tu ku masatukur~…ĺaj a zazan, jadańß ku aazińßan nu pau ¶jan mar~…ĺ…ô ¶apu tujni a zazan nu ma ¶i. pikutkutan tu kwaŇč, zikuz a kaziz…ôŇč **** a mińß ¶aan tastasan tu, mar~…ĺa u kańß…ônur~…ĺan ma ¶i a zazan nu ¶in-pj…ôn. ¶an- ¶u-sjaŇč "r~…ĺajar~…ĺ a kamu, ts*g-tsńß*-ńß*Ňč", r~…ĺajak a imi sa ujza u ¶an mir~…ĺakuitaj tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° a ¶u ¶ud…ôdan, misur~…ĺit tu mi ¶ar~…ĺiwa tu ¶u ¶ud…ôdan a r~…ĺuma. tuzu Ē~ ° u niatatur~…ĺ…ôs aŇčaŇčan a zazan adidi Ē~ °aj a ¶u ¶ud…ôdan, sa ¶a ńßaw mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp ku tatukian tu pananukas tu ¶j…ô- ¶…ôd, amir~…ĺijas tu ka ¶…ôr~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺ nu tad…ômaw. ujni a zazan u mi ¶aŇčzaj…ô tu bju Ē~ ° ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj sa ¶ur~…ĺin a zaza, r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us mi ¶umud ku kaziz…ôŇč. ¶iw-b…ôn sa u sakatajza i r~…ĺuj-baŇč kar~…ĺinr~…ĺakuaj a zazan sj…ôn-tau *** baŇčgu mapaŇčaŇča a ¶a tu kaziz…ôŇč zazan, kar~…ĺipunan a zidaj u " ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ sanaj kaziz…ôŇč a zazan", mańßiniaj tu ku nizat…ôŇč nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° pawap…ôn tu kaziz…ôŇč mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, a ¶ar~…ĺuwaj ku mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °aj tu tuud. ujni ¶iw-b…ôn pika ¶awan tu basu a pajaj tini a patizaŇč, tini mar~…ĺa pi ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan a zazan nu katuudaj nu midaŇčaj a r~…ĺabaŇč. ujza i ¶iw-b…ôŇč a kitizaan tunu udad, tunu bar~…ĺi sa sakasa tiniaj badańßuŇč a nisaŇča Ē~ °an matinińß ku nis…ôkian, badańßuŇčaj a sapad pasaksak…ôn tu ¶a ¶aj sisi ¶…ôn tu r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj a tamaka "r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj a tatip…ôr~…ĺuk", u sapir~…ĺawa Ē~ ° tu bar~…ĺi udad, sa ¶a majasuj ku sapisaŇča Ē~ ° a kur~…ĺisiw, nika kar~…ĺar~…ĺudan mińß…ôdup tu akuti Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us. ujzasa kir~…ĺur~…ĺ masatukuj tu ajza, sisa tiniaj mu…ôn…ôŇč a tad…ômaw ńßajmaw sa pakutaj…ôn tu nu amutuaj a badańßuŇč, r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj baŇč…ôs a badańßuŇč ańß…ôkar~…ĺ ńßajmaw satu mar~…ĺawp…ôs. ¶iw-b…ônaj mar~…ĺumanaj tu mar~…ĺumanaj nipab…ôr~…ĺiaj nu tańßak jadańß ku asu Ē~ °aj a kakan…ôn, patinaku mur~…ĺu a tar~…ĺi atu mur~…ĺu a tubańß, ¶aaj ku izawaj tu a tubańß atu tar~…ĺi a asu dada Ē~ °, iza ńß…ônaj ku mur~…ĺu wadajan atu mi ¶id…ôkaj a muw- ¶a, ¶ima atu kur~…ĺ…ô ¶u a asu Ē~ °, ¶u Ē~ °d…ôt akuti Ē~ ° ńßamin kapańß, baŇčsis kud…ôt asu Ē~ °aj a kukuj nu tar~…ĺi, tatuŇčus ku si ¶…ôdam ańß…ô ¶id nu ¶awakuj, r~…ĺabu matum…ôs ku sajtaw anipatabu "ni ¶ik ¶ikan a sajtaw" maa ¶akaj a kabus a ¶awakuj, sumanańßaj mur~…ĺuaj tamud nu nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu nipatawa, patatuŇčus tu sik…ôd…ôtaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a baŇč…ôs atu mi ¶id…ôk ku sapit…ônas a tawju, ¶aaj kujni dada Ē~ ° iza ńßwna ku r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj a tunus, taw ¶iw, pitan asu Ē~ °aj a kaka…ôn. ¶iw-b…ôn "paazińß tu nakamuan mir~…ĺawr~…ĺawaj a di Ē~ °tu" tawja a d…ômiad mar~…ĺiŇč tańßkar~…ĺ paazińß tu katar~…ĺawa, makaj ajza a d…ômiad mar~…ĺiŇčatu mikawaw katukuńß **/** a d…ômiad, situŇčusa tujni a kawaw ajaw a pakatin…ôŇč , pat…ôŇč mipaz…ôŇč i panan nu s…ôn-pin a piazińßan tu ka ¶udu * ku kudińß nu mapatajaj a mipanaŇč, iza ńß…ônaj ku mu-na-s, r~…ĺabuaj baju nu mi ¶id…ôkaj a butiŇč a paazińß tu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj. **" . mar~…ĺaitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj tu zumaaj anatin…ôŇčan
